definition: 华丽蜕变；逆袭；颜值/气质全面提升；自我成长蜕变

dialogue.content:
A: Hey, have you seen Alex lately? Total glow up!
B: I know right! She looks completely different from last year. Such an inspiration!

examples.en: My biggest glow up was choosing peace over everything.
examples.zh: 我最大的蜕变是学会选择内心的平静。

examples.en: Breakup glow up is real — she looks amazing now!
examples.zh: 分手逆袭是真的——她现在看起来太惊艳了！

examples.en: 2026 is my year for a glow up, mark my words!
examples.zh: 2026是我的蜕变之年，记住我说的话！

usage_tips: Glow Up 可以用作名词（a glow up）或动词短语（glow up）。在社交媒体上常见于 Before & After 对比照的场景，表达从外貌到心态的全面提升。2026年在抖音、小红书等平台与「逆袭」「自我提升」话题强关联。
